title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, discusses his decision to build an ad monetization platform for AI tools after raising $26M. He argues that advertising, not subscriptions, will sustain AI applications, and identifies human trust in AI agents as the real bottleneck rather than technology itself.
